mapper.insert: insert into kh_symptoms_collection (name, code, descript, prop_inpart, source_site, source_code) values ( #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{descript,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{propInpart,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceSite,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select id, name, code, descript, prop_inpart, source_site, source_code, create_time from kh_symptoms_collection where LOWER(name) like #{name} limit 20
